name: HRT Professionals LLC
recent_news: Founded Aug 2018 to address non-emergency behavioral health transport gap; received $73,934 PPP loan in 2020 via Prospect Bank.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus / student transport operator - focused on secure behavioral health patient transport for hospitals. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Universal Transportation Solutions
districts_or_customers: Mississippi six coastal counties; LA, TX, AL, TN routes
recent_news: Started 2011 by Jerry & LaShonna Wells after operating with a partner; minority/woman-owned NEMT business serving coastal MS and adjacent states.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT (non-emergency medical) operator, not a school-bus contractor. Out of scope for Summit student transportation tuck-in.

name: Hartley's School Buses
districts_or_customers: school districts in ND and MT
recent_news: Founder Hartley Hageness passed away March 2025; company continues operating across Rugby, ND and Kalispell, MT locations under his stated vision but succession not publicly disclosed.
fit_notes: Independent family-owned school bus operator with high succession signal (founder died 3/2025); also holds Blue Bird dealership in ND/MT - dealership complicates pure tuck-in but the contracting routes in ND/MT are credible bolt-on; ND is outside Summit's core states. Worth a conversation.

name: Custer's Garage Inc
recent_news: Acquired by Warren M. Levy / Levy School Bus Company during his 1988-2013 tenure; continues to operate as Custer's Garage subsidiary serving Spring-Ford SD; Warren Levy Jr. now leads Levy Bus management team.
fit_notes: Already a subsidiary of Levy School Bus Company (family-owned strategic). Not an independent tuck-in - any acquisition would be at the Levy parent level.

name: Romano's School Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: Colonial SD board approved $6.85M purchase of the Romano property at 1065 Belvoir Rd in Sept 2019; First Student took over operations from the depot housing ~200 buses. Romano's listed as CLOSED on multiple directories; the listed website Firststudentinc.com confirms the takeover.
fit_notes: Operation absorbed by First Student (EQT Infrastructure-owned competitor platform) ~2019; property sold to Colonial SD. Not an independent tuck-in target.
